nodes.name: 厄立特里亚
nodes.summary: 厄立特里亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联74种鸟类，包括鸵鸟、Clapperton's spurfowl、Yellow-necked spurfowl等74种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-billed starling
nodes.summary: The white-billed starling (Onychognathus albirostris) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in Eritrea and Ethiopia. Habitat In the Degua Tembien district it was found on steep cliffs. References
nodes.shortSummary: The white-billed starling (Onychognathus albirostris) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in Eritrea and Ethiopia.

nodes.name: White-billed starling
nodes.summary: White-billed starling（Onychognathus albirostris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-billed starling。
